case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. MYRA ORIOLA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF ATTORNEY IN RESPONSE TO THE COURTS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100128277) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-10-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-20-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200017970), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK SERVED SEP-29-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORIOLA, MYRA A/K/A MYRA A ORIOLA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORIOLA, MYRA A/K/A MYRA A ORIOLA $6,565.32 PRINCIPAL, $293.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,858.32, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100116436)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100148566) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ORIOLA, MYRA A/K/A MYRA A ORIOLA
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 100116436) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ORIOLA, MYRA A/K/A MYRA A ORIOLA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-29-2020

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $293.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100116436) AS TO DEFENDANT ORIOLA, MYRA A/K/A MYRA A ORIOLA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100116436) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-20-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
